intentSynonyms: show me my members in slack
see all my members in slack
list members of a channel in slack
description: List member user IDs of a Slack channel with optional pagination. Returns user IDs only — use get_user_profile to resolve a specific user ID to a name/profile, or list_users to get all workspace users with names.

channel.description: Channel ID to list members for (e.g., C01234567)

limit.description: Maximum number of members to return (default 100, max 1000)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response for fetching the next page
